hero.desc4: , is an Indian politician who is the Working President of Telangana Pradesh Congress Committee since 28 June 2021. He was a member of the Telangana Legislative Assembly for Sangareddy constituency from 2018 to 2023.

biography.lead: From councilor to legislative chambers, his journey is a testament to the belief that politics is, above all, a vocation of service.
biography.quote: The strength of a leader is measured by the dignity restored in the lives of the people.
biography.block1_desc: Born on 7 July 1966 in Indrakaran, Medak district, India, he has dedicated decades of his life to public service and leadership, earning recognition for his commitment to the people and the region.
biography.block3_desc: Believes in an inclusive India where opportunity is universal — strengthening farmers, supporting small businesses, and elevating women and youth into leadership.
biography.block4_desc: Leads by listening. Decisions are made closest to the people they affect, rooted in transparency, accountability and tireless on-the-ground presence.

journey.m1_desc: He started career as a councilor and then became municipal chairman
journey.m2_desc: He was elected as the MLA from the Sangareddy constituency, reflecting the trust and support of the people through his political leadership.
journey.m3_desc: He was re-elected as the MLA from the Sangareddy constituency, reaffirming his strong public support and influential presence in regional politics.
journey.m4_desc: In 2014, he contested from the Medak constituency, but was unsuccessful in securing victory as MLA.
journey.m5_desc: He was elected as the MLA from the Sangareddy constituency representing the Indian National Congress (INC), reaffirming his strong public support and influential presence in regional politics.

appearances.lead: A glimpse into rallies, speeches, interviews and welfare programmes that anchor a life of constant public engagement.
appearances.t3: KJS India Private Limited Unit 2 at Thogarpally.
appearances.d1: Jagga Reddy warmly interacted with children who visited his residence seeking bicycles, listening attentively to their requests and encouraging them with compassion and support.
appearances.d2: Jagga Reddy continues to lead a bicycle distribution initiative in Sangareddy, bringing joy and support to young children across the constituency. In the latest phase of the program, he distributed bicycles to 70 more children, with special focus on those below eight years of age. With this, the total number of bicycles distributed has reached 400.
appearances.d3: The 651 crore project is expected to generate direct employment for 1,551 people and indirect opportunities for nearly 5,000 more, while strengthening Telangana's food processing and FM ecosystem.
appearances.d4: Jagga Reddy participated in the bhajan programme at the temple and joined devotees in devotional singing.
appearances.d5: Jagga Reddy visited the dargah and offered prayers, showing his respect for the spiritual site and connecting with the local community.
appearances.d6: Jagga Reddy participated in the delimitation ceremony, engaging with local leaders and residents to discuss the implications of the new boundaries.

achievements.card1_desc: Jagga Reddy assures ₹300 crore for Sangareddy Municipality, seeks votes in 38 municipal wards
achievements.card2_desc: Built micro-irrigation networks across 120 villages, lifting farm incomes.
achievements.card3_desc: Funded higher education for students from underprivileged backgrounds.
achievements.card4_desc: Championed the development of roads, health centres and public schools in underserved blocks.
achievements.card5_desc: Recipient of multiple state and national recognitions for community service and clean politics.
achievements.card6_desc: Organised several free medical camps, screening vast number of citizens.
